basic_details.job_title: Territorial Army 130 INF BN (TA) ECO KUMAON Recruitment Rally 2026 – Apply For 69 Soldier Vacancies
basic_details.short_information: 130 Infantry Battalion (Territorial Army) Ecological, KUMAON has released the 130 INF BN (TA) ECO KUMAON Recruitment Rally 2026 notification for 69 Soldier vacancies across 10 trades. Eligible ex-servicemen of the Armed Forces and ex-women employees of MoEF & CC and State Forest Department with a minimum of 20 years of service can register online at www.130ta.com or report directly for the recruitment rally at Devkatiya Ground, Pithoragarh, Uttarakhand from 03 to 08 August 2026.

application_fee.details: The official notification does not specify any application or registration fee for the 130 INF BN TA ECO KUMAON Recruitment Rally 2026. Candidates can complete online registration at www.130ta.com without any mention of a payment step, and those reporting directly for the rally are also not required to pay any fee at the venue.

qualification.details: Eligibility for the 130 INF BN TA ECO KUMAON Recruitment Rally 2026 is restricted to two specific candidate groups: ex-servicemen of the Armed Forces, and ex-women employees (including premature retirees) of the Ministry of Environment, Forest & Climate Change (MoEF & CC) and the State Forest Department. Both groups must meet the service, medical, and character conditions listed below. | Enrolment window: Candidates should be enrolled within 5 years from their date of retirement. Medical Category: SHAPE-I is required. Character: Must be Exemplary or Very Good. Qualification: Ex-servicemen must be of Indian Domicile and pension holders only. Ex-women employees (including premature retirees) of MoEF & CC and the State Forest Department must have rendered a minimum of 20 years of service in MoEF & CC or the State Forest Department. Conduct: Candidates should not be involved in any civil or police cases. | Candidates wondering about the recruitment procedure can note that it differs by category. Ex-servicemen Male candidates undergo a physical fitness test - a 1.6 km run, pull-ups, a 9 ft ditch, and balance, all assessed as per age criteria - followed by a medical test and interview for those shortlisted. Ex-women employees of MoEF & CC and SFD instead go through an interview by the Board of Officers (BOO), a proficiency test in afforestation-related activity and nursery management conducted by the BOO, and a medical examination.

salary_details.details: This is not a regular salaried government job, and the notification does not specify a fixed monthly salary or pay scale. Candidates are paid only for the period they are actually embodied (engaged in service), which depends on the requirement of the funding agency and the direction of the unit or higher headquarters in a given year. | Ex-servicemen are initially engaged for a period of 2 years, extendable by 1 year at a time, subject to satisfactory performance. As per Ministry of Defence letter No. PC to MF 68640/ECO/Gen/TA-2/513/US/D(GS-III)/2018 dated 30 October 2018, service rendered in Infantry Battalion (TA) Ecological units by ex-servicemen is not admissible to pension, increment, or gratuity. Service of ex-servicemen and ex-women employees in these Ecological units is treated as rehabilitation and is not at par with service of soldiers in the Regular Army or Territorial Army. The organisation does not provide or promise permanent employment of any kind. Authorities conducting the rally are not responsible for any accident or injury to candidates during the recruitment rally. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: Selection under the 130 INF BN TA ECO KUMAON Recruitment Rally 2026 follows a multi-stage process spread across the rally dates

beginning with document verification and ending with medical examination and interview of shortlisted candidates. The exact process differs slightly depending on whether the candidate is an ex-serviceman or an ex-woman employee of MoEF & CC/SFD.
Online Registration (before the rally): Register at www.130ta.com as per the eligibility criteria and terms of engagement
or plan to report directly with documents if registration is not possible. Document Verification (03 August 2026): Original documents are checked at Devkatiya Ground

assessed as per age criteria. Interview & Proficiency Test (for Ex-women employees of MoEF & CC/SFD): Interview by the Board of Officers along with a proficiency test in afforestation-related activity and nursery management. Medical Examination & Interview of Shortlisted Candidates (05 to 08 August 2026): Candidates who clear the physical test or BOO assessment undergo medical examination and a final interview. Merit-based Enrolment: Enrolment is purely on merit basis and is subject to the number of vacancies actually available in each trade.
how_to_apply: Candidates can follow these steps to apply for the 130 INF BN TA ECO KUMAON Recruitment Rally 2026 and report for the rally with all required documents in hand.
Visit www.130ta.com or scan the official QR code to review eligibility criteria and terms of engagement.
Complete the online registration with accurate personal, service, and domicile details.
If online registration cannot be completed due to a technical or other issue, plan to report directly for the rally instead.
Report to Devkatiya Ground, Pithoragarh, Uttarakhand on 03 August 2026 at 0600 hrs with all original documents listed in the documents-required section.
Undergo document verification on Day 1, followed by the physical test/BOO assessment on Day 2, and medical test & interview (if shortlisted) between 05 and 08 August 2026.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in the 130 INF BN TA ECO KUMAON Recruitment Rally 2026?
faq.answer: There are 69 total vacancies across 10 Soldier trades, with Soldier (General Duty) accounting for the largest share at 49 posts.

faq.question: Q2. Who is eligible to apply for this recruitment rally?
faq.answer: Ex-servicemen of the Armed Forces (enrolled within 5 years of retirement, Medical Category SHAPE-I) and ex-women employees, including premature retirees, of MoEF & CC and the State Forest Department with a minimum of 20 years of service are eligible.

faq.question: Q3. When and where is the recruitment rally being held?
faq.answer: The rally will be held at Devkatiya Ground, Pithoragarh, Uttarakhand, from 03 to 08 August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for online registration or for reporting at the rally.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment rally?
faq.answer: Selection involves document verification, followed by a physical fitness test (for ex-servicemen male) or an interview and proficiency test by the Board of Officers (for ex-women employees), and finally medical examination and interview of shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent government job with pension benefits?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that no permanent employment is provided, and as per a 2018 Ministry of Defence letter, service in this Ecological battalion is not admissible to pension, increment, or gratuity.

faq.question: Q7. What documents do ex-servicemen need to carry to the rally?
faq.answer: Ex-servicemen male candidates must carry their original PPO & Discharge Book, Domicile Certificate/Aadhaar Card, and eight copies of a photograph.

faq.question: Q8. What if I cannot complete online registration at www.130ta.com?
faq.answer: Candidates who fail to register online due to a technical or other issue can still report for the recruitment rally on 03 August 2026 at 0600 hrs with all requisite documents.

faq.question: Q9. How long is the initial engagement period for selected candidates?
faq.answer: Ex-servicemen are initially engaged for 2 years, which can be extended by 1 year at a time subject to satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official registration website is www.130ta.com, where candidates can also find the eligibility criteria and terms of engagement.
